hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight text-navy-900
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-slate-500

layout.spacing_strategy: Generous padding. Use p-8 to p-16 for sections to give breathing room. Avoid cramped data unless in specific admin tables.
layout.cards: bg-white rounded-md border border-slate-200 shadow-sm. No neon glows or dark glassmorphism.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-sans font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#112A46] shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A192F] border border-[#0A192F] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-sans font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50
buttons.accent: bg-[#E15A46] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-sans font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#C94E3C] shadow-sm

components.hero_section: Cream background or subtle abstract paper texture. H1 in Playfair Display (Navy). Left-aligned text for readability. Solid Coral primary CTA and outlined Navy secondary CTA. Professional legal imagery on the right.
components.kpi_stat_card: Flat white card, 1px border-slate-200, shadow-sm, p-6. Small-caps label in slate-500, large serif number in Navy. Optional subtle success-green trend indicator.
components.pricing_card: White background, distinct from page background. Navy header or border-top for the 'Pro' tier. Clear list of features with checkmarks. Solid buttons.
components.navigation_bar: Sticky white or cream background (no dark glass). Navy text links. Coral button for 'Start Notarization'. Bottom border of slate-200.
components.trust_badge_svg: Circular official seal design. Deep navy outer ring with 'VERIFIED NOTARY - FLORIDA RON COMPLIANT' wrapping around. Inner circle cream/gold with a classic fountain pen, notary stamp, or scales of justice icon. 1px gold serrated or double-line border.
components.admin_pages: Keep utilitarian but map to new palette. White background, simple borders. Keep IBM Plex Sans for data density. No dark mode by default.

anti_patterns_to_remove: Gradient text effects (bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-400 via-cyan-400 to-purple-500 bg-clip-text)
Mono-font UPPERCASE TRACKING-WIDEST for generic labels
Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur with low opacity over dark backgrounds)
testing_and_attributes: Preserve all `data-testid` attributes and route paths exactly. Only rewrite the UI/CSS.

hero_bg_legal.description: Close-up wide-angle photograph of a premium fountain pen resting on official legal documents, warm natural morning sunlight, soft cream and deep navy color palette.
hero_bg_legal.usage: Use as a supporting image in the hero section or 'Start Notarization' callouts.

abstract_paper_bg.description: Abstract warm cream and textured paper background with very subtle deep navy geometric framing.
abstract_paper_bg.usage: Use as background for sections needing texture, like testimonials, feature blocks, or trust-badge marketing.

professional_signing_1.usage: Use in Notary Directory or Profile placeholders, or 'Become a Notary' sections.

professional_signing_2.description: Woman signing on white printer paper.
professional_signing_2.usage: Use in 'Field Document Scanner' contextual sections or public verifier.

instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor the UI components to align with the 'Corporate Trust Notary' aesthetic, replacing the cyberpunk look. Use Playfair Display for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Add generous padding and replace all dark/glassmorphic cards with flat, white, softly bordered boxes (shadow-sm). Use Deep Navy as the primary brand color, Cream as the background, and Warm Coral as the accent. Redesign the Trust Badge SVG to look like a physical stamp or seal using the new color palette. Preserve ALL data-testid attributes and existing logic/routes. Do NOT remove functional code.
